dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of core admin activity and platform health.
dashboard.statNotificationsDescription: Pending alerts for the current user.
dashboard.statSystemLogsDescription: Latest technical events from the platform.
dashboard.recentSystemLogsDescription: Last technical events recorded by the platform.
dashboard.criticalStatusDescription: Error-level events in the latest scan.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage organization users, roles and statuses.
users.emptyDescription: Try changing search or status filters.

form.createDescription: Create a new user in the active organization.
form.editDescription: Update user profile and organization role.
form.roleUnresolvedDescription: Select a role for this user in the active organization.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

statusDialog.title: Change user status
statusDialog.impactDescription: Inactive or blocked users will not be able to sign in.

detail.emptyMembershipsDescription: This user is not assigned to any organization yet.

organizationsDialog.title: Manage organizations
organizationsDialog.description: Update organization roles and membership status for {{email}}.
organizationsDialog.confirmRemove:
Remove organization membership?

{{email}} will lose access to {{organization}}.
organizationsDialog.cannotRemoveSelf: You cannot remove yourself from the active organization
organizationsDialog.mustKeepOneActive: Active user must keep at least one active membership

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Manage organizations, their statuses and core counters.
organizations.searchPlaceholder: Search by organization name or slug
organizations.emptyDescription: Try changing search or status filters.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.slugMin: Slug must be at least 2 characters
validation.slugFormat: Slug must contain only lowercase latin letters, numbers and dashes

statusDialog.title: Change organization status
statusDialog.impactDescription: Inactive organization cannot be used as active context. Users may lose access to this organization.

roles.title: Roles
roles.scopeNotice: Roles are scoped by organization. Select organization before editing role permissions.
roles.selectOrganizationDescription: Roles are scoped to a single organization.
roles.searchPlaceholder: Search by role name or code
roles.emptyDescription: Try changing search or include system filters.

toolbar.organizationScoped: Roles are scoped to the selected organization.

permissionsDialog.title: Edit permissions: {{name}}
permissionsDialog.description: Configure role permissions grouped by module.
permissionsDialog.empty: No permissions available for this organization.

form.createDescription: Create a new organization role. Permissions can be configured after creation.

validation.codeMin: Code must be at least 2 characters
validation.codeFormat: Use lowercase latin letters, numbers, _ or -
validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Read-only registry of permissions registered by core and modules.
permissions.helper: Permissions are managed by platform core and module manifests. Admin UI cannot create or edit them.
permissions.searchPlaceholder: Search by code, module, resource or action
permissions.emptyDescription: Try changing search query or module filter.
permissions.emptyGroupsDescription: Try changing search query or module filter.

settings.description: Manage global, organization and module settings.

form.createDescription: Create a new setting for global, organization or module scope.
form.editDescription: Update setting value. Key and scope metadata are read-only in edit mode.
form.restrictedDescription: Only super_admin can update GLOBAL settings and global MODULE settings.

errors.localeUnsupported: Only ru and en locales are supported

validation.keyMin: Key must be at least 2 characters
validation.moduleRequired: Module is required for MODULE scope

schemaDialog.title: Module settings schema
schemaDialog.selectModule: Select a module to inspect settings schema.
schemaDialog.noSchema: This module manifest has no settings schema.

jsonEditor.label: Value (JSON)
jsonEditor.help: Value must be valid JSON. Strings must be wrapped in quotes.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.searchPlaceholder: Search action, entity, user, organization, metadata
audit.emptyDescription: Try changing search query or filters.
audit.detailDescription: Detailed view for selected audit event.

system.title: System Logs
system.description: Technical and runtime events from the platform.
system.searchPlaceholder: Search message, source, user, organization, context
system.emptyDescription: Try changing search query or filters.
system.detailDescription: Detailed view for selected technical runtime event.
